holdings.infoBox: ARKF is an equity ETF with a total of 39 individual holdings. The top holdings are Shopify stock at 9.31%, Ark Bitcoin Etf Holdco (Arkf) at 6.03%, Robinhood Markets at 5.90%, Block at 5.77%, and Coinbase Global at 5.39%.

overview.description: The ARK Blockchain & Fintech Innovation ETF (ARKF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund of stocks related to financial technology innovation. ARKF was launched on Feb 4, 2019 and is issued by ARK.

data.text: ETFs from iShares, T. Rowe Price, ARK, Alger, and KraneShares have pre-IPO stakes in OpenAI or Anthropic.
